ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., Asia, Europe, Americas) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Type of operating system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the session was tracked */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was recorded */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions for the city on the given date */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the metric belongs to */,
  "bot_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of bot sessions */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions */,
  "bot_session_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of bot sessions */,
  "total_session_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total sessions */,
  "avg_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of sessions */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic source (e.g., organic, paid, referral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the traffic belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic source */,
  "sessions_from_source" INTEGER /* Number of sessions from the traffic source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_traffic_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES traffic_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_traffic_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
